message:
feat(analytics): add per-session scatter query for Explorer visualization

Introduce `SessionScatterPoint` type and `query_session_scatter()` to power
the new Explorer scatter plot. The query aggregates per-session message counts
and API token totals by joining conversations → messages → message_metrics,
with multi-tier fallback: prefers message_metrics API columns, falls back to
token_usage.total_tokens, then conversation-level grand_total_tokens rollups.

Key design decisions:
- Uses the same AnalyticsFilter infrastructure (agent, source, workspace,
  time range) so scatter data respects all active dashboard filters
- Handles the api_data_source column migration gracefully: when present,
  only trusts rows marked 'api' or NULL-with-valid-values; when absent,
  uses the original heuristic
- Parameterized LIMIT for caller control (Explorer uses 600)
- Includes comprehensive test coverage: basic sorted output, agent+source
  filtering, token_usage fallback when message_metrics API fields are NULL,
  and api_data_source column backward compatibility

Also adds `SessionScatterPoint` to the public re-export list in mod.rs and
new `setup_usage_hourly_db()` / `setup_session_scatter_*` test helpers plus
tests for hourly timeseries rollup and tools-by-hour grouping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
